CustomField.description: This formula field equals "Yes" whenever Status indicates that the file is in the application phase and is not over a year old. Useful for filtering records.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( OR( ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c , "Application Submitted") , ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c , "Application Complete")), (TODAY() - DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate) <= 365)), "Yes", "No")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula field equals "Yes" whenever Status indicates that the file is in the application phase and is not over a year old. Useful for filtering records. If an application is out of date, edit and save it to reset Current Application to Yes.
CustomField.label: Current Applicant
